title: Uno Reverse Cow
description: "The ultimate 'no u' for Minecraft. Try to milk a cow, and she'll milk you instead. Get a custom bucket of 'YourName's Milk'!"
body:
# 🐮 Uno Reverse Cow
Have you ever felt that milking cows in Minecraft is a bit... one-sided? It's time to turn the tables! Uno Reverse Cow is a lightweight, hilarious Fabric mod that brings the ultimate "Uno Reverse Card" energy to your farm.

## ✨ Features
**The Big Reverse:** When you try to milk a cow with an empty bucket, the cow milks you.

Personalized Loot: Instead of generic milk, you receive a bucket named "[Your Player Name]'s Milk".

**Immersive Effects:**
Includes the classic milking sound and a cheeky action bar message to let you know who's boss now.

**Lightweight:** No complex setups, no new ores, just pure, concentrated irony.

## 🛠 How to use
Craft a Bucket.

Approach a Cow.

Right-click and realize that in this mod, cow milks you!

## 📦 Technical Details
Platform: Fabric

Version: 1.21.11

Requirements: Fabric API
